allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\); npm config list; echo "---"; npm config get cafile; npm config get proxy; npm config get https-proxy)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem Cert:\\LocalMachine\\Root | Where-Object { $_.Subject -notmatch "Microsoft|Windows|Sectigo|GlobalSign|DigiCert|Entrust|VeriSign|Symantec|GoDaddy|Comodo|USERTrust|IdenTrust|Certum|thawte|Let's Encrypt|ISRG|Baltimore|COMODO|QuoVadis|SwissSign|Actalis|Buypass|AAA Certificate" } | Select-Object Subject, Issuer)
